  • Constructor Details

    • Fuel

      public Fuel(NamespacedKey key, Material fuelMaterial, int burnTime)
      Create a new fuel for furnaces
      Parameters:
      key - Key for recipe
      fuelMaterial - Fuel to register
      burnTime - Time this fuel will burn for (in ticks)

    • Fuel

      public Fuel(NamespacedKey key, Tag<Material> fuelTag, int burnTime)
      Create a new fuel for furnaces
      Parameters:
      key - Key for recipe
      fuelTag - Tag to use as fuel
      burnTime - Time this fuel will burn for (in ticks)

      public static List<Fuel> getVanillaFuels()

    • getFuel

      @Deprecated public Material getFuel()
      Deprecated.
      Use getFuelMaterial() instead

      Will be working on using ItemStacks for recipes in the future

      Get the material of this fuel
      Returns:
      Material of fuel (null if non-existent)
